title: Job Note Frontmatter — project_id amendment
description: Additive patch to specs/001-vaultcontrol-architecture/contracts/job-note.frontmatter.schema.json. Adds a required project_id field. Pre-existing job notes are migrated to project_id='vaultcontrol' by a one-shot script; new dispatches always carry the field.

project_id.description: Owning project; resolved from inbox note (or schedule entry) at job creation.
